name: @crm/shared
description: Shared Prisma schema, Types and Zod schemas

scripts.prepare: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('prisma/schema.prisma')){require('child_process').execSync('npm run build',{stdio:'inherit'})}else{console.log('[@crm/shared] prepare skip — schema.prisma nao presente (typical pre-COPY de Docker multi-stage)')}"
